analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class progression features (ASI). The feature name, class, and level progression (4th, 8th, 12th, 16th, 19th) are standard.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, directly quotes or closely mirrors the standard Player's Handbook text for Ability Score Improvement, and specifies the cap of 20.

mechanics.limitation: Ability score cannot exceed 20 through this feature.
